embed.title: !tracked
embed.description: Show everything you're currently tracking, across every tracking type, grouped by category.

fields.name: Output format
fields.value: Each rule appears with a `[id:XX]` prefix. Use that ID with `{{prefix}}untrack id:XX` to remove one specific rule without disturbing the others.

fields.name: Related commands
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}script` — export your tracking as a list of commands (useful for backups)
`{{prefix}}untrack id:<N>` — remove one rule
`{{prefix}}profile` — switch to a different tracking profile
